title: OPEC+ grabs headlines
summary:
Main
By Yiannis Parganas
The global oil market has been riding through intense swings, with Brent crude tumbling 6.85% just last week after Saudi Arabia signaled it's prepared to handle a stretch of lower prices. OPEC+, spearheaded by Saudi Arabia and Russia, has committed to ramping up production for a second month in a row, adding another 411,000 barrels per day (bpd) in June. Altogether, by the end of the April-June window, nearly a million bpd will have returned to the market.
